title: Squirrel Removal in Montclair, NJ | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Montclair, NJ. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Licensed experts serving Montclair homes and businesses. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Squirrels invading your Montclair home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout Montclair, New Jersey, with pricing ranging from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent future entry into your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Montclair and the surrounding New Jersey communities with rapid response times and guaranteed results. Our certified wildlife specialists understand the unique challenges of Montclair's tree-lined neighborhoods and historic homes, providing tailored squirrel removal solutions that protect both your property and local wildlife.
localContext: Montclair's beautiful Victorian and Colonial homes, along with the tree-canopied streets near Watchung Plaza and Upper Montclair, create ideal conditions for squirrel activity. The proximity to parks like Brookdale Park and the many mature oak and maple trees throughout residential areas mean squirrels frequently seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and wall voids of local properties.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Montclair, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Montclair typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on factors such as the number of squirrels, entry points, damage extent, and whether babies are present. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Montclair home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls (especially at dawn and dusk), visible entry holes near the roofline, chewed wires or wood, droppings in the attic, and squirrels seen entering or exiting your home. Montclair's older homes are particularly susceptible to squirrel entry through damaged soffits and roof vents.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Montclair?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New Jersey wildlife regulations and use only humane removal methods. Our process includes live trapping when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors, and relocation according to state guidelines. We never use poisons or inhumane methods, and we're fully licensed for wildlife control in New Jersey.

faqs.question: What does your squirrel removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, humane squirrel removal, sealing all entry points with durable materials, attic cleanup and sanitation if needed, damage repair, and a warranty against re-entry. We also provide recommendations to make your Montclair property less attractive to future wildlife intrusions.
